headline: Trade Desk Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Up Y/Y, Stock Down
summary: TTD beat revenue estimates as AI launches, strategic partnerships and strong CTV growth drove momentum despite an EPS miss.

raw.headline: Trade Desk Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Up Y/Y, Stock Down
raw.summary: TTD beat revenue estimates as AI launches, strategic partnerships and strong CTV growth drove momentum despite an EPS miss.

headline: SONY's Q4 Earnings Plunge Y/Y Despite Healthy Revenues, G&NS Weakens
summary: Sony Q4 FY2025 revenues jump 8% to 3,036.4B yen, but GAAP EPS fall to 13.93 yen as gaming and "All Other" weighed on results.

raw.headline: SONY's Q4 Earnings Plunge Y/Y Despite Healthy Revenues, G&NS Weakens
raw.summary: Sony Q4 FY2025 revenues jump 8% to 3,036.4B yen, but GAAP EPS fall to 13.93 yen as gaming and "All Other" weighed on results.
